summary: GenC Vibez frontend tested end-to-end on web preview (mobile viewport 390x844). Registration, login, rooms list, room chat (send message), profile, games (Spin the Wheel + Card Game), leaderboard, friends placeholder, and profile edit modal all working. CRITICAL ISSUE: Logout does not work because Alert.alert with confirm buttons is not supported in react-native-web — onPress callbacks attached to Alert buttons never fire on web; the same affects any error toasts shown via Alert.alert (register validation errors, game errors, etc.). Minor issues: Profile edit modal opens but Display Name input is not pre-filled with existing value; member grid in room chat overlaps with chat scroll area on narrow screens; bottom tab label uses 'Rankings' while spec says 'Leaderboard'.

ui_bugs.issue: Tapping Logout shows no confirmation and does not log the user out. Alert.alert('Logout', 'Are you sure?', [{onPress: logout}]) does not invoke the onPress callback in react-native-web — window.alert is shown without buttons, so logout() never runs. Same pattern would silently fail any Alert.alert with action buttons. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx:68-72

When opening edit profile, the Display Name TextInput appears empty instead of pre-populated with the current displayName. Bio field works fine. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx (editing state initialization)

Member grid (36 slots) layout overlaps with messages container — only the first row of avatars is visible before chat starts overlapping it. The grid and chat list appear to share the same scroll/flex region without a fixed-height divider. Reference: /app/frontend/app/room/[id].tsx
Leaderboard tab is labeled 'Rankings' in the tab bar instead of 'Leaderboard' as per spec.

No testID attributes anywhere in the app — every TouchableOpacity, TextInput, and key Text element lacks testID, making automated testing fragile (had to rely on visible text + bounding boxes, which broke when duplicate text strings like 'Create Account' appeared as both heading and button).

integration_issues.issue: logout() in AuthContext is never invoked because react-native-web's Alert.alert does not support the buttons param. User stays signed in even after tapping Logout.

Games use Alert.alert to show 'Not enough coins' and error messages — on web, these will show a basic window.alert without action buttons, but currently work since they have no onPress. Worth standardising on a custom Toast/Modal for web parity.

issues: Member grid avatars overlap with chat messages container
No explicit 'Leave Room' label — only back chevron at top-left (spec mentioned a Leave Room button)
Display Name field appears blank when entering edit mode (should pre-populate current value)
Tab labelled 'Rankings' instead of 'Leaderboard' per spec

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Likely originates from a TouchableOpacity / View prop in one of the screens. Should migrate pointerEvents={...} to style={{pointerEvents:'...'}}.

Alert.alert with buttons array is not interactive on react-native-web — onPress on Alert buttons never fires. Replace with a cross-platform confirm modal (custom component) or use Platform.OS check + window.confirm() fallback for web. Affects: profile.tsx (logout confirm), register.tsx and login.tsx (validation alerts), games.tsx (insufficient coins / error).

action_items: Replace Alert.alert('Logout', ..., [{onPress: logout}]) in profile.tsx with a cross-platform confirm (e.g., a custom Modal or Platform-aware window.confirm) so logout actually fires on web.
Pre-populate the Display Name TextInput in profile edit mode with the current user's displayName.
Fix room chat layout: give the member grid a fixed/maximum height and place chat messages in a scrollable area below it (avoid overlap).
Rename bottom tab 'Rankings' to 'Leaderboard' (or update spec) to match the design brief.
Add testID attributes to all key interactive elements (inputs, buttons, tabs, room cards, send button, play buttons, logout button, edit-profile button) to make UI automated testing reliable.
Fix the 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' warning by moving pointerEvents prop into style.
Consider adding an explicit 'Leave Room' button in the room header (currently only a back chevron exists).
Replace all Alert.alert error/success messages with a cross-platform Toast/Snackbar component for consistent UX on web and native.
critical_code_review_comments: No testID attributes anywhere in the codebase – every interactive React Native component is missing testID, hindering automated testing.
Alert.alert is used for critical flows (logout, validation errors, game errors) but is broken on react-native-web; should be abstracted behind a platform-aware confirm/toast utility.
AuthContext.logout uses localStorage key 'auth_token' wrapped in JSON.stringify (via storage util) — verified working; routes are protected via redirect in (tabs)/_layout — fine.
Backend ObjectIds are returned as 24-char hex strings (e.g. '6a1a98303bef4632c3341d15') — verified no raw Mongo _id leakage in API responses.
Room chat polling: API endpoints /api/messages/{roomId}, /api/rooms/{id}/members, /api/rooms are hit repeatedly (every ~3s) — consider WebSocket or longer polling interval to reduce load.
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly via process.env; no hardcoded URLs detected.
seed_data_creation: Registered two test users via API/UI: tester1780131683@test.com / password123 and finaltest1780132164@test.com / password123. Joined World Vibez and Games Hub rooms; posted 'Hello from test!' message in World Vibez; played Spin the Wheel and Card Game once each (coins balance went 100 → 115 → 130 → 120). XP was awarded for messaging (1 XP).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth token can be injected via window.localStorage.setItem('auth_token', JSON.stringify('<JWT>')) — the storage util stringifies values, so the JSON quotes are required. The page has TWO 'Create Account' texts (heading at top + button at bottom); always pick the lower bounding-box one when clicking. Logout requires fixing Alert.alert before retesting end-to-end logout. Default test creds: tester1780131683@test.com / password123. Backend internal IDs are stable hex24 strings — World Vibez = 6a1a98303bef4632c3341d15.
rca_of_issue: Logout failure RCA: profile.tsx:68-72 calls Alert.alert('Logout', 'Are you sure...', [{text:'Cancel'},{text:'Logout', onPress: logout}]). react-native-web's Alert.alert implementation falls back to window.alert(title+'\n'+message) which ignores the buttons argument entirely, so neither Cancel nor Logout onPress is ever invoked. The fix is platform-aware: on web, use window.confirm() and call logout() if true; on native, keep Alert.alert. Reproduction: open /profile while authenticated, tap Logout, observe URL stays /profile and localStorage 'auth_token' is unchanged.
